text.title: caching-invalidation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for caching-invalidation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using KEYS * pattern for bulk invalidation in production hot paths.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: KEYS is O(N) against total keyspace and blocks Redis single-thread event loop. Use tag-based invalidation with SMEMBERS, version-based with INCR, or SCAN with a cursor for non-blocking iteration.

failure-mode.description: Setting different TTLs on a key and the tag SETs that reference it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tag SETs with shorter TTL than member keys become empty before members expire, making future invalidations miss the stale keys. Tag SETs with longer TTL accumulate expired key names indefinitely, wasting memory.
